fixesApplied.description: Removed the combined '.dark, .dark-bg' background-image rule. Added '@utility bg-dark-pattern' that combines bg-charcoal color + dark texture image properties. Added standalone '.dark-bg' rule using @apply bg-dark-pattern. The .dark class no longer gets the texture background-image.
Replaced 'before:bg-charcoal' with 'before:bg-dark-pattern' in both dark mode conditional class strings (content div at line 349, media div at line 375).
Replaced 'before:bg-charcoal' with 'before:bg-dark-pattern' in both dark mode conditional class strings (content div at line 62, media div at line 95). Kept in sync with TSX.
